[type]
Parser

[grammar]
grammar T;
<ImportRuleInvocationStack()>

s
@init {
<BuildParseTrees()>
}
@after {
print($r.ctx.toStringTree(recog=self), file=self._output)
}
  : r=a ;
a : 'x' {
print(str_list(self.getRuleInvocationStack()), file=self._output)
} ;

[start]
s

[input]
x

[output]
[a, s]
(a x)
